name: SN74HC595 I/O Expander (shift register)
description: The SN74HC595 component allows you to use SN74HC595 shift registers as I/O expanders ([datasheet](http://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/sn74hc595.pdf), [SparkFun](https://www.sparkfun.com/products/13699)) in ESPHome. It uses 3 wires (optionally 4) for communication. Optionally, it can be added to a SPI bus to allow sharing pins with other components.
